query: Please create a 3-day itinerary for a group of 3 departing from Fort Wayne and heading to Charlotte, spanning from March 8th to March 10th, 2022. We have a budget of $1,900. Our group will need to find accommodations that allow pets and provide entire rooms. We would also prefer a journey that doesn't involve any flights.

plan.transportation: self-driving, from Fort Wayne to Charlotte
plan.attraction: Levine Museum of the New South;NASCAR Hall of Fame;The Mint Museum;
plan.accommodation: Elegant Studio Apt in Prospect Heights, Charlotte

plan.breakfast: Life Grand Cafe;Tuk Tuk Indian Street Food;
plan.attraction: Discovery Place Science;Billy Graham Library;Reedy Creek Nature Center;
plan.accommodation: Elegant Studio Apt in Prospect Heights, Charlotte

plan.breakfast: Cafe Maple Street;Prince Snacks & Momo's Point;
plan.attraction: Books Monument;The Charlotte Museum of History;Fourth Ward Park;
